{%- if (theme_prev_next_buttons_location == 'bottom' or theme_prev_next_buttons_location == 'both') and (next or prev) %}
{%- if prev %} Previous {%- endif %} {%- if next %} Next {%- endif %}
{%- endif %}
{%- block contentinfo %}

{%- if show_copyright %}© Copyright {{ copyright }}.{%- endif %} {%- if last_updated %} Last updated on: {{ last_updated }}.{%- endif %} Built with Sphinx.

{%- endblock %}
